{{Quote|I've got a load of high priority spares for the Brodsport Mining Corporation.|[[Kyle Katarn]], under the alias of [[Kyle Katarn|Dan Drexel]]|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Brodsport Mining Corporation''' was a company located in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Trid]] on [[Danuta]]. [[Rel Farley]] was the assistant manager.

{{Company-stub}}
